creator: mellon@pobox.com
text:
Alright, so I'm crazy enough to actually remove all the erroneous
"it's" from kernel source, call me pedantic. There seem to have been exactly 74
of them. Do with it what you wish; hopefully they'll get committed either
all together or in pieces. Uuencoded gzip of unified diff of all ./sys is
appended below; please contact me if you need any other diff or anything.

Fix: 

-- 
Anatoly Vorobey,
mellon@pobox.com http://pobox.com/~mellon/
"Angels can fly because they take themselves lightly" - G.K.Chesterton--9BROwCMa9PMmt9T2Gcn7Q7L2ynz4gRCJE6J3apc4Q7XU7meO
Content-Type: text/plain; name="diff.gz"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="diff.gz"
